summary: The diff shows only backend/main.mo (truncated), a new backend/migration.mo, and project_state.json were changed. REQ-10 (backend fixes) has partial evidence in backend/main.mo. REQ-11 (frontend fixes), REQ-12 (auth/onboarding flow fixes), and REQ-13 (date utilities fixes) have no evidence of implementation in the diff — no frontend files were modified.

missing_requirements.requirement: Audit and fix all frontend issues across all pages and components, including broken React Query hooks in useQueries.ts, incorrect data fetching or mutation logic, broken modal dialogs (AddMachineModal, EditMachineModal, DeleteConfirmDialog, RescheduleDateModal), malfunctioning alert banners (DueTodayAlertBanner, OverdueAlertBanner), and any rendering errors or broken UI interactions in Dashboard.tsx and AddContactDetailsPage.tsx.
missing_requirements.reason: No frontend files were modified or added in the diff. Files like useQueries.ts, AddMachineModal, EditMachineModal, DeleteConfirmDialog, RescheduleDateModal, DueTodayAlertBanner, OverdueAlertBanner, Dashboard.tsx, and AddContactDetailsPage.tsx are entirely absent from the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Fix all issues in the app's authentication and onboarding flow: ensure Internet Identity login correctly triggers the AddContactDetailsPage for new users and the Dashboard for returning users, and that logout properly resets the per-principal localStorage state.
missing_requirements.reason: No frontend files (App.tsx or related auth/onboarding files) were modified in the diff. There is no evidence of changes to authentication flow, onboarding routing, or localStorage state management.

missing_requirements.requirement: Fix all issues with date utilities in frontend/src/utils/dateUtils.ts, including correct conversion between IC nanosecond timestamps and JavaScript Dates, accurate machine cleaning status computation (ok, due-soon, due-today, overdue), and correct next-due-date calculation logic.
missing_requirements.reason: frontend/src/utils/dateUtils.ts was not modified or added in the diff. No changes to StatsBar or StatusBadge components are present either.

hallucinated_features.description: A new backend/migration.mo file was added implementing a data migration module converting List types to Array types for auditLogs and contacts.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention adding a migration module or converting List to Array storage types. This is an addition beyond fixing existing broken functionality.
